message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen multitasking like a pro—trying to whip up dinner while keeping an eye on the kids. As I was chopping veggies, I could smell something... not quite right. Turns out, I had left a pan on the burner a bit too long! 

In that moment, I remembered our family fire escape plan, which we reviewed just the week before. We all have our roles, and it made me feel a bit more in control. I quickly turned off the burner, and we laughed it off—small win! 

It was a good reminder that even in the chaos, a little preparedness can save the day. Have you reviewed your escape plan with your family lately? 😊
